title: gnome-control-center and gnome-settings-daemon bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
gnome-control-center
[3.28.2-39]
- Fix missing icons in some languages (broken translations)
  Resolves RHEL-4180

[3.28.2-38]
- Add subscription manager keywords to find Subscription settings
  Resolves #1937113

gnome-settings-daemon
[3.32.0-21]
- Add icon to subman notifications
  Resolves: RHEL-5074

[3.32.0-20]
- Backport some upstream smartcard changes that make it work
  better with p11-kit
  Resolves: #1796190
- Rework how subscription-manager plugin is conditionalized so
  it doens't get built on centos 8 stream

[4.32.0-19]
- Make power-button-action default to poweroff on servers
- Resolves: #1920829

[3.32.0-18]
- Prevent automatic logout warning in greeter sessions
- Resolves: #2018606

[3.32.0-17]
- Make power-button-action respect the 'nothing' action on VMs
- Resolves: #2062051

[3.32.0-16]
- Update pt_BR translations
- Resolves: #2003069

[3.32.0-15]
- Keep auto-logout working inside VMs
  Resolves: #1904139

[3.32.0-14]
- Update fr, ja, zh_CN translations
- Resolves: #1876291

[3.32.0-13]
- Add back subscription-manager plugin
  Related: #1870837

[3.32.0-12]
- Handle org.gnome.Shell.Screencast Stopped signal
  Related: #1705392
full_text:
gnome-control-center
[3.28.2-39]
- Fix missing icons in some languages (broken translations)
  Resolves RHEL-4180

[3.28.2-38]
- Add subscription manager keywords to find Subscription settings
  Resolves #1937113

gnome-settings-daemon
[3.32.0-21]
- Add icon to subman notifications
  Resolves: RHEL-5074

[3.32.0-20]
- Backport some upstream smartcard changes that make it work
  better with p11-kit
  Resolves: #1796190
- Rework how subscription-manager plugin is conditionalized so
  it doens't get built on centos 8 stream

[4.32.0-19]
- Make power-button-action default to poweroff on servers
- Resolves: #1920829

[3.32.0-18]
- Prevent automatic logout warning in greeter sessions
- Resolves: #2018606

[3.32.0-17]
- Make power-button-action respect the 'nothing' action on VMs
- Resolves: #2062051

[3.32.0-16]
- Update pt_BR translations
- Resolves: #2003069

[3.32.0-15]
- Keep auto-logout working inside VMs
  Resolves: #1904139

[3.32.0-14]
- Update fr, ja, zh_CN translations
- Resolves: #1876291

[3.32.0-13]
- Add back subscription-manager plugin
  Related: #1870837

[3.32.0-12]
- Handle org.gnome.Shell.Screencast Stopped signal
  Related: #1705392

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23368.html
